allCaughtUpDescription: You have no reviews due today. Great job keeping up with your study schedule!
bestStreakFetchedStandings: Best streak in the fetched standings
exploreMoreDescription: Add topics to your plan — you can change this anytime.
exploreEmpty: No more topics to explore right now.
noEnrolledTopicsTitle: You haven't added any topics yet
noEnrolledTopicsDescription: Explore the catalog below and add the topics you want to learn.
readyToStartDescription: Start a session to begin building mastery on your new topics.
enrollFailed: Could not add this topic. Please try again.
removeTopicWarning: This removes the topic from your plan and discards its review history. You can add it again later, but it starts fresh.
removeTopicFailed: Could not remove this topic. Please try again.
clearDueQueueFirst: Clear the due queue before opening a new topic. It is the cheapest way to keep retention high.
completePracticeForBreakdown: Complete some practice sessions and your topic breakdown will appear here.
completePracticeToRank: Complete more practice to appear in the leaderboard.
dashboardHeroCalmDescription: Your queue is under control. This is a good moment to reinforce strong topics or push into something new.
dashboardHeroDueDescription: You have {{count}} topics ready for review. Start there first and the rest of the week stays lighter.
earlyRetentionStage: Early retention stage. Frequent practice will matter most.
goodRetentionShape: Good shape, but a few weak spots need regular review.
goodShortReviewCandidate: Good candidate for a short review
keepKnowledgeFresh: Keep your knowledge fresh with spaced repetition
leaderboardDescription: A cleaner ranking view that keeps the competitive feel without the oversized full-screen layout.
learningHealthDescription: Small, frequent reviews protect progress better than catch-up sessions.
masteryOverviewDescription: Sorted so weak and fragile topics surface first.
noMasteryDescription: Complete a few practice sessions and your topic strengths will show up here.
noTopicsDue: No topics are due for review right now. Great work!
noUpcomingReviewsDescription: Nothing is scheduled in the next {{count}} days. Finish a practice session to schedule your next reviews.
noUrgentReviewDebt: There is no urgent review debt right now.
onboardingAdaptiveDescription: Practice sessions choose questions from the current backend question bank and your review history.
onboardingLeaderboardActionDescription: Compare XP and streaks once you have completed a few sessions.
onboardingPracticeActionDescription: Answer a short set, get immediate feedback, and let the scheduler update your review dates.
onboardingProgressActionDescription: Use progress pages to see what is stable, what is fading, and what is due next.
onboardingProgressDescription: Your dashboard, progress page, and leaderboard all use live backend data.
onboardingReadyDescription: No setup is required. You can start a session now, or skip this intro and explore at your own pace.
onboardingReviewDescription: LearnLab uses smart review scheduling to bring topics back before they fade.
onboardingPickDescription: Choose what you want to learn — you can change this anytime.
onboardingWelcomeDescription: LearnLab helps you practice discrete mathematics, track retention, and review topics at the right time.
onboardingWhatYouCanDoDescription: A quick map of the main learner flow.
practiceStreakHelper: The easiest way to protect retention
progressNextActionTitle: Progress that tells you what to do next
progressSpacedRepetitionDescription: Spaced-repetition data is most useful when it reduces ambiguity. This view is tuned to show what is stable, what is drifting, and where a short review buys the most.
queueAdviceDue: Review the due topics before chasing new XP. That protects the strongest parts of your progress and prevents weak topics from compounding.
queueControlledAdvice: Your queue is controlled, so you can practice for reinforcement or expand into fresh topics without creating avoidable review debt.
reinforceThenExpand: Use one short practice set to reinforce what already feels strong, then expand from there.
reviewAgendaDescription: Each day below lists the subtopics scheduled for review. Adjust the window to plan further ahead.
reviewScheduleDescription: See which days have reviews coming up and which topics are due, so you can plan your study time.
reviewScheduleError: Could not load your review schedule. Please try again.
searchRankDescription: Search by learner name or rank.
startFirstSession: Start a practice session to begin tracking your progress.
startReviewSessionImpact: A short review session will do the most work right now.
startWithHighestRetention: Start with the items that will buy back the most retention.
strongRecallHelper: Topics already sitting in a stable range
topicBreakdownDescription: Detailed spaced-repetition topic cards, still sorted by where attention matters most.
topicsRevisitedFirst: Topics that should be revisited first
tryDifferentLearnerSearch: Try a different learner name or clear the search filter.
useSmallSession: Use a small session to reinforce strong topics without building pressure.
yourPositionDescription: A compact summary of how you compare with the current board.
